seo.title: Rafael Garcez | Cloud, Cybersecurity and Infrastructure
seo.description: Technical portfolio for Rafael Garcez, built on infrastructure, Linux, networking, NOC/SOC operations and an active focus on Cloud Security and Cybersecurity.

hero.name: Rafael Garcez
hero.title: Cloud Security | Cybersecurity | Secure Infrastructure and Operations
hero.description: I turn hands-on experience in infrastructure, Linux and networking into secure and resilient digital environments. With 15+ years across operations and NOC/SOC contexts, I now focus on Cloud Security, Blue Team practices and hardening of critical systems.
hero.panelLine1: Practical base in infrastructure, availability and operational response.
hero.panelLine2: Growth driven by certifications, labs and self-directed projects.
hero.panelLine3: Current focus on Cloud Security, Blue Team, hardening and lean operations.
